title: Arachnangraecum humbertii
taxonomy: Arachnangraecum humbertii is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, Orchidaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Gradioleae and is a member of the genus Arachnangraecum. The classification of Arachnangraecum humbertii is still a matter of research and some information might be subject to change. However, it is generally accepted as a distinct species within the Orchidaceae family. Further studies are needed to confirm its exact classification within the plant kingdom.

Traditional uses in Madagascar include treating various health issues, such as fever and skin conditions.
